description: Use this API to calculate and report circuit breaker interrupting duty for 3-phase faults at all buses in a specified subsystem of the working case (activity BKDY). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = bkdy(sid, all, apiopt, lvlbak, flttim, bfile, ffile)
python_syntax: ierr = bkdy(sid, all, apiopt, lvlbak, flttim, bfile, ffile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation in the api. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: lvlbak
parameters.description: Number of levels back for contributions. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: flttim
parameters.description: Default fault duty time. flttim >= 0.0. (input; 0.0 by default).

parameters.name: bfile
parameters.description: Breaker duty data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ffile
parameters.description: Fault specification data file (if apiopt is 2). (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

lvlbak.description: fault currents and local contributions, plus contributions LVLBAK levels back.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
fixed bus shunt table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
